creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Re-send of followup from 12/16/09... bug-followup@ was not in the CC 
list of the followup request for some reason.

pav@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Is this patch still required? With the current revision of the port, I'm
> getting the same output with and without your patch:
>   

It looks like 8.0 does not fail when pshared is true like 7.x did... the
manpage hasn't been updated though.

This was on a sparc64 system which I no longer have access to, but since
the threading implementation in 7.0-RC1 didn't support shared
semaphores, I would expect that the latest 7.x doesn't either, so the
patch is still needed.
